column.name: ASMDesignation
column.description: Designation/title of the Area Sales Manager in the reporting hierarchy for the sale (e.g., "ASM"); often null when the hierarchy mapping is missing for that transaction.

column.name: ASMEmpCode
column.description: Business/HR code for the Area Sales Manager (often an alphanumeric label); may be blank or null if not maintained in source systems.

column.name: ASMEmpId
column.description: System employee identifier for the Area Sales Manager in the hierarchy; stored as text and may be null when the ASM is not tagged to the order/customer.

column.name: ASMName
column.description: Name of the Area Sales Manager responsible for the territory/account; can be null if hierarchy attribution is unavailable.

column.name: Added_Date
column.description: ETL/load timestamp when this row was added to the reporting table; useful for incremental extracts and data freshness checks.

column.name: AdditionalDiscAmt
column.description: Monetary value of any additional discount applied beyond standard/product discounts (in currency); typically 0.00 when no extra discount is given.

column.name: AdditionalDiscount
column.description: Rate/amount input for additional discount (often a percentage value when type is Percentage); interpret together with AdditionalDiscountType.

column.name: AdditionalDiscountType
column.description: Indicates how AdditionalDiscount should be interpreted (e.g., "Percentage" vs amount); blank/null means not specified.

column.name: BasicAmount
column.description: Base line/order amount used as a foundation for discount/tax calculations (pre-tax, before some adjustments depending on process); often equals OrderFinalAmt/TotalValue in samples.

column.name: BasicRate
column.description: Base unit rate for the SKU (price per unit) before discounts/taxes; may be null if unit pricing is not captured at this grain.

column.name: BillNo
column.description: Invoice/bill number generated for the sale; can be blank for non-invoiced/early-stage orders or when bill data is not integrated.

column.name: CGST
column.description: Central GST amount applied on the taxable value for intra-state sales; 0.00 when not applicable (e.g., inter-state or exempt).

column.name: CashDisc
column.description: Cash/early-payment discount amount applied at billing; usually 0.00 unless cash discount schemes are used.

column.name: ClaimAmt
column.description: Claim amount associated with schemes/returns/settlements linked to the sale line; typically 0.00 when no claim is raised.

column.name: ClientCity
column.description: City of the buying client/customer; used for geographic analysis and may reflect master data quality (spelling variants).

column.name: ClientDivision
column.description: Customer’s division/segment classification from client master (may contain multiple values like "Parlour,Both"); null/blank indicates not assigned.

column.name: ClientGSTNo
column.description: GSTIN of the client for taxation/compliance; may be blank for unregistered customers.

column.name: ClientPinCode
column.description: Postal code of the client address; may be blank when not captured in master data.

column.name: ClientRefrence
column.description: External reference for the client/order (e.g., customer reference number); often blank if not used by the channel.

column.name: ClientState
column.description: State of the client; important for GST routing (CGST/SGST vs IGST) and regional reporting.

column.name: ClientStatus
column.description: Lifecycle status of the client in master data (e.g., Active/InActive); analysts often filter to Active for current market views.

column.name: ClientTypeGroup
column.description: High-level grouping of client type (e.g., "P3"); used for channel segmentation and aggregation.

column.name: ClientZone
column.description: Zone/region of the client (e.g., North/South); supports regional rollups and performance views.

column.name: Client_Id
column.description: Unique numeric identifier of the client/customer (indexed); primary key for joining to customer master and should be used for filtering to reduce scans.

column.name: Client_Name
column.description: Display/trade name of the client/customer; not unique and may vary in spelling, so join using Client_Id for accuracy.

column.name: Client_Type
column.description: Specific client category (e.g., Retailer, Parlor Whole Sale); use with ClientTypeGroup for channel mix reporting.

column.name: ContactCategory
column.description: Contact/category label for the client record (often similar to Client_Type); can be blank and should not be assumed complete.

column.name: Designation
column.description: Designation of the selling employee associated with the transaction (e.g., Sr. TSI, Super Stockiest); used for role-based performance analysis.

column.name: DiscountPer
column.description: Overall discount percentage indicator captured as an integer; often 0 and may not reflect all discount components—use discount amount fields for financial accuracy.

column.name: Division
column.description: Business division/line of business for the sale (indexed, e.g., Retail, Parlor); a key slicer for reporting and recommended filter column.

column.name: EmpCity
column.description: City of the primary selling employee (Emp_Id); used for territory alignment and workforce analytics.

column.name: EmpName
column.description: Name of the primary selling employee or entity credited for the sale; use Emp_Id for stable joins/identification.

column.name: EmpState
column.description: State of the selling employee/HQ mapping; supports salesforce regional analysis and hierarchy rollups.

column.name: EmpZone
column.description: Zone/region of the selling employee; used to analyze performance by salesforce geography.

column.name: Emp_Id
column.description: Unique numeric identifier of the employee credited for the sale (indexed); use to join to HR/salesforce master and filter for performance queries.

column.name: Function
column.description: Functional code/identifier linked to the transaction (often blank); may represent internal mapping like channel/function and should be treated as optional metadata.

column.name: GrossAmount
column.description: Amount after some discounts but before taxes or final adjustments depending on process; compare with TaxableAmountWithOutDisc/NetAmount to understand the pricing waterfall.

column.name: HQState
column.description: State of the employee’s headquarters/base location; used for HQ-wise reporting and hierarchy alignment.

column.name: IGST
column.description: Integrated GST amount for inter-state sales; usually 0.00 when CGST/SGST are applied instead.

column.name: Label
column.description: Employee/customer label or external code used for identification in field systems (e.g., "GS10487623"); not guaranteed unique across all contexts.

column.name: MarginValue
column.description: Reported margin value for the line/order (profit contribution); often null indicating margin not computed or not available in this feed.

column.name: MonthName
column.description: Month name bucket derived from order date (e.g., Jan, Feb); useful for quick grouping but prefer OrderDate for time intelligence.

column.name: NetAmount
column.description: Net payable/value after taxes and/or discounts as defined by the business process; validate against TotalValue/OrderFinalAmt when building financial measures.

column.name: OrderDate
column.description: Business order date (indexed, date-only); primary time dimension for sales trending and recommended filter for large scans.

column.name: OrderFinalAmt
column.description: Final order amount captured for the transaction after applied discounts (pre/post tax depending on configuration); often matches BasicAmount/TotalValue in samples.

column.name: Order_Date
column.description: Order timestamp (indexed, datetime); use for intra-day analysis and operational cutoffs, otherwise prefer OrderDate for reporting.

column.name: Order_Id
column.description: Unique numeric order identifier (indexed); use to group lines into an order and join to order header systems.

column.name: PositionCode
column.description: Sales position/territory code for the credited employee at time of sale; can be null and may change over time, so treat as a snapshot attribute.

column.name: ProductDiscAmt
column.description: Monetary discount amount specifically attributed to product-level discounts; typically 0.00 when no product discount applies.

column.name: Product_Category
column.description: Category/segment of the product; supports category mix analysis but may contain product-like text in some cases due to master data issues.

column.name: Product_Name
column.description: Name/description of the product sold; not unique—use Variant_Id/VSKUCode for product-level joins.

column.name: QPSDisc
column.description: QPS (quantity/price scheme) discount rate/value indicator; interpret with QPSDiscountType and QPSdiscamt to compute actual benefit.

column.name: QPSDiscountType
column.description: Defines whether QPSDisc is a percentage or amount; blank/null means no QPS scheme type recorded.

column.name: QPSdiscamt
column.description: Calculated/applied monetary amount for QPS discount; use this for financial rollups rather than QPSDisc when available.

column.name: RSMDesignation
column.description: Designation/title of the Regional Sales Manager in the hierarchy (e.g., RSM); may be null when hierarchy isn’t mapped.

column.name: RSMEmpCode
column.description: Business/HR code for the Regional Sales Manager; used for mapping to HR systems, may be null/blank.

column.name: RSMEmpId
column.description: System employee identifier for the Regional Sales Manager; stored as text and may be missing depending on tagging.

column.name: RSMName
column.description: Name of the Regional Sales Manager for hierarchy rollups; treat as descriptive and not a join key.

column.name: SGST
column.description: State GST amount applied for intra-state sales; typically paired with CGST and 0.00 when IGST applies.

column.name: SchemeEndDate
column.description: End datetime of an applied scheme/promotion; null when the sale is not linked to a scheme.

column.name: SchemeLabel
column.description: Identifier/label of the scheme/promotion applied; null indicates no scheme attribution on the transaction.

column.name: SchemeStartDate
column.description: Start datetime of the applied scheme/promotion; use with SchemeEndDate to validate scheme eligibility windows.

column.name: SlabSchemeAmt
column.description: Monetary benefit amount from slab-based schemes (tiered incentives); null/0 when not applicable.

column.name: SlabSchemePer
column.description: Percentage benefit from slab-based schemes; null when not applicable or when amount-based slabs are used.

column.name: SourceCity
column.description: City of the source party (e.g., distributor/stockist) supplying the goods; used in supply chain/channel attribution analysis.

column.name: SourceClientId
column.description: Identifier of the source entity (distributor/stockist) in the client master; use for joins to source partner attributes.

column.name: SourceContactCategory
column.description: Contact category for the source entity; often null and should be considered optional enrichment.

column.name: SourceContactType
column.description: Contact type/channel classification for the source entity (e.g., Parlor); may be null depending on data availability.

column.name: SourceFunction
column.description: Internal function/code for the source entity or transaction routing; often numeric text and may be blank.

column.name: SourceGSTNo
column.description: GSTIN of the source entity; useful for compliance checks, often null/blank in samples.

column.name: SourceName
column.description: Name of the source entity (e.g., Distributor/Super Stockiest name); descriptive field for reporting.

column.name: SourcePinCode
column.description: Postal code of the source entity address; may be blank due to incomplete master data.

column.name: SourceState
column.description: State of the source entity; used to assess tax applicability and supply region reporting.

column.name: SourceStatus
column.description: Status of the source entity in master data (e.g., InActive); may be null when not maintained.

column.name: SourceType
column.description: Type of source entity in the channel (e.g., Distributor, Super Stockiest); key for primary/secondary flow analysis.

column.name: SourceTypeGroup
column.description: Higher-level grouping of source type (e.g., Primary/Secondary); used to classify transaction flow and reporting layers.

column.name: SourceZone
column.description: Zone/region of the source entity; supports regional supply/channel analysis.

column.name: TLDesignation
column.description: Designation/title of the immediate team lead/manager in the sales hierarchy for the credited employee; used for managerial performance rollups.

column.name: TLHQ
column.description: Headquarter/location associated with the team lead; useful for hierarchy and HQ-wise performance views.

column.name: TLLabel
column.description: Label/code identifying the team lead in field systems; may be used as an alternate identifier but not guaranteed unique.

column.name: TLLevel2HQ
column.description: HQ/location of the level-2 manager above TL; supports multi-level managerial rollups.

column.name: TLLevel2Label
column.description: Label/code for the level-2 manager; may be blank when not captured.

column.name: TLLevel2Name
column.description: Name of the level-2 manager in the hierarchy; descriptive for reporting.

column.name: TLName
column.description: Name of the immediate team lead/manager; use hierarchy IDs/codes when available for stable mapping.

column.name: TSMDesignation
column.description: Designation/title of the Territory Sales Manager in the hierarchy; may be null when not applicable or unmapped.

column.name: TSMEmpCode
column.description: Business/HR code for the Territory Sales Manager; may be blank when not maintained.

column.name: TSMEmpId
column.description: System employee identifier for the Territory Sales Manager; stored as text and can be null.

column.name: TSMName
column.description: Name of the Territory Sales Manager; descriptive hierarchy attribute.

column.name: TaxableAmountWithOutDisc
column.description: Taxable amount before discounts (as defined by the feed) used as a basis for GST calculation; compare to TotalAmountWithoutDisc and GST fields to validate tax logic.

column.name: ToClientEmpDesignation
column.description: Designation of the employee mapped to the destination client/account (account owner at client side mapping); used for customer-coverage reporting.

column.name: ToClientEmpLabel
column.description: Label/code of the employee mapped to the destination client/account; often aligns to field-system employee label.

column.name: ToClientEmpName
column.description: Name of the employee responsible for the destination client/account; descriptive for account ownership analysis.

column.name: ToClientEmpTLDesignation
column.description: Designation of the team lead for the destination client’s mapped employee; used for customer hierarchy rollups.

column.name: ToClientEmpTLLabel
column.description: Label/code for the team lead of the destination client’s mapped employee; may duplicate ToClientEmpLabel in some data scenarios.

column.name: ToClientEmpTLName
column.description: Name of the team lead for the destination client’s mapped employee; descriptive hierarchy attribute for coverage reporting.

column.name: ToPositionCode
column.description: Sales position/territory code for the destination client mapping (e.g., territory assignment); use to analyze client coverage and organizational alignment.

column.name: TotalAmountWithoutDisc
column.description: Total amount before discounts (often pre-discount value at line/order level); useful to compute effective discount by comparing to TotalValue/OrderFinalAmt.

column.name: TotalGST
column.description: Total GST amount applied (typically CGST+SGST or IGST); use for tax reporting and reconciliation.

column.name: TotalMRPValue
column.description: Total MRP value for the quantity sold; used to compute discount-to-MRP metrics, may be 0.00 when MRP not available.

column.name: TotalProductQty
column.description: Total quantity of product units in the line/order aggregation represented by the row; stored as bigint and typically a small integer (e.g., 6).

column.name: TotalValue
column.description: Total final value of the sale as reported (often equals OrderFinalAmt/BasicAmount); use as the primary sales value measure unless business defines NetAmount differently.

column.name: VSKUCode
column.description: Variant/SKU code used in ordering/billing systems; recommended for product joins when Variant_Id is not available across systems.

column.name: Variant_Id
column.description: Unique numeric identifier for the product variant/SKU (indexed); primary join key to product master and a recommended filter for performance queries.

column.name: Variant_Name
column.description: Name/description of the variant/SKU; may match VSKUCode or Product_Name and should be treated as descriptive.

column.name: primarydiscamt
column.description: Monetary amount of primary discount applied (typically company-to-trade/primary channel discount); use for discount breakdown and profitability analysis.

column.name: secondarydiscamt
column.description: Monetary amount of secondary discount applied (typically trade-to-retail/secondary channel discount); often 0.00 and used to split discount components.
